_readme: APPROVED recipe: every knob pinned (a later generic-default change cannot restyle this look). starcomb resolution: CLI > this file > GENERIC.

notes.spcc: narrowband mode on the composed HOO stack: R sees Ha (656.28 nm), G and B both carry OIII (500.7 nm) — the palette assigns one line to two channels, so both get the OIII wavelength; bandwidths left at siril's defaults (the tutorial data's dual-band filter model is unrecorded)
notes.solve: same field and hint as the lpro set (M8/M20): solve_field.py --ra=270.8 --dec=-23.9 --radius-deg=10; the composed stack is half-size and its doubled XPIXSZ keeps the header-derived scale hint correct

approved.judgment: results/judgment_hoo_20260709_223314 (vs the data author: full pair + ha_core/oiii_region/dark_sky crops)
approved.note: no-regression baseline BLOCKED on the colour-gate redesign (emission-flooded class fails colour by scope, achromatic metrics clean); record it when that lands
